---
name: Tracking issue
about: Map a milestone or multi-issue outcome without authorizing implementation
title: "Tracking: "
labels: "enhancement, tracking"
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the recognizable outcome this tracker coordinates.

## Existing foundation

- [ ] Completed or already available foundation

## Focused issues

- [ ] Focused decision or implementation issue

## Dependency order

Describe the critical path and work that may proceed independently.

## Exit criteria

- [ ] Every focused child has landed with completion evidence.
- [ ] The complete outcome is verified at the appropriate boundary.
- [ ] Maintained documentation agrees with shipped behavior.
- [ ] Deliberately deferred behavior is explicit.

## Out of scope

- Adjacent tracks and product behavior not owned here

## Tracking policy

This tracker is not directly executable and must not receive `agent-ready`.
New implementation belongs in focused issues with bounded contracts.

## Completion evidence

Record the child issue map, delivered outcome, verification, documentation,
remaining limitations, and milestone result.
